name: Epaminondas
author: Robert Abbott (1975) / AGP port
description: A war game of phalanxes. A phalanx is a straight line of friendly pieces; it slides 1 up to its own length along its axis. A strictly longer phalanx captures a shorter enemy phalanx head-on. Win by 'crossing' onto the opponent's back row with more pieces than they hold on yours, a lead they cannot equalize on their reply.
